name: SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes
title: SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes
syntax: long SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes ( char IpAddress [],dword Port, dword TLSEnabled) //form 1
long SCC_CreateSECCDiscoveryRes ( char IpAddress [], dword Port, dword Security, dword TransportProtocol ) //form 2
description: Creates a SECC Discovery Response message for sending.
Form 2 allows to specify arbitrary byte values for the two message parameters Security and TransportProtocol.

parameters.name: IpAddress
parameters.description: String representation of the EVSE’s IPv6 address in the usual notation.

parameters.name: TLSEnabled
parameters.description: 1 for TLS, 0 for no transport layer security.

parameters.name: Security
parameters.description: Security field (1 byte), valid values: 0x00 = TLS, 0x10 = No transport layer security.

parameters.name: TransportProtocol
parameters.description: Transport protocol field (1 byte), valid values: 0x00 = TCP.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
